ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Estate
Off Calendar Apr-24-2017 Continued To Jun-05-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brandon Erickson appeared by telephone for Theresa Baker.

Mr. Erickson stated that he secured a substitute petitioner and that the new petitioner has sent documents back to them incomplete twice. Status on close of the Estate is continued to June 5, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Estate
Off Calendar Mar-08-2017 Continued To Apr-24-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brandon Erickson (by CourtCall) for petitioner Theresa Baker.

Mr. Erickson stated that no inventory and appraisal has been filed, as the estate has no assets, only debts. He added that the petitioner has now passed away, so he will need to substitute in a new administrator. He requested that the status hearing be continued for 60 days. The matter was continued to April 24 2017 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)
